title: eragrostis biformis
intro: Eragrostis biformis, also known as Love Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis biformis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and treat respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and infusions can be used to make topical applications, such as salves and creams, although further research is needed to confirm the efficacy of these preparations.
